summary: PART I BUSINESS AND PRODUCTS Overview We are a leading branded apparel company that designs, sources, markets and distributes products bearing the trademarks of our portfolio of lifestyle brands: Tommy Bahama, Lilly Pulitzer, Johnny Was, Southern Tide, TBBC, Duck Head and Jack Rogers. Our business strategy is to drive excellence across a portfolio of lifestyle brands that create sustained, profitable growth.
